enrichment.summary: Kyle discusses a new month-long project: mapping ancient Rome in Google Earth by tracing a historical map (the Forma Urbis Romae) he found on the David Rumsey historical map site overlaid on Google Earth. He explains the history of the map — commissioned under Septimius Severus, lost, rediscovered as stone fragments behind a church, and eventually reconstructed — and his excitement about using it to build a detailed 'Boulder Rome' model.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.topic: mapping ancient Rome in Google Earth
stances.position: extremely excited and committed — plans to spend a month tracing the entire city
finds it incredible that such detailed ancient records survived and are now usable for his project
sees a complete Rome map as the essential foundation for modeling Boulder after Rome
